description: Lock industrial_quality_control to inspection, tolerances, gauges, and statistical quality methods without scientific-management context.

checks.reason: The date now anchors Hall's documented conformity and uniformity method rather than an unsupported broad industrial placeholder.
Interchangeable parts provide the repeatability and tolerance problem space for industrial quality control.
Statistical quality methods retain probability and statistics as an enabling edge.
Scientific management is managerial workflow context, not a direct quality-control measurement prerequisite.
